CrossRepoTarget.description:
Cross-repo target: routes contributions from this repo to a
different (forked/external) repository via a fork-contribution
workflow.

auto_fork.description: When true, automatically create the fork via the forge API before pushing.
auto_fork.title: Auto Fork

base_branch.description: The upstream branch to target in the cross-fork PR (default: main).
base_branch.title: Base Branch

fork_remote_url.description: The fork repository URL where the branch is pushed before opening a cross-fork PR.
fork_remote_url.title: Fork Remote Url

upstream_remote_url.description: The upstream repository URL that PRs are opened against.
upstream_remote_url.title: Upstream Remote Url

CrossRepoTarget.title: CrossRepoTarget

RepoConfig.description:
Configuration for a single repository — its board identity,
Langfuse observability project credentials, and per-repo CI
monitor settings.

board_id.description: Board identifier this repo's tickets are routed to (e.g. 'robotsix-mill').
board_id.title: Board Id

ci_monitor_enabled.description: When true, the CI monitor polls this repo's main-branch CI status periodically.
ci_monitor_enabled.title: Ci Monitor Enabled

ci_monitor_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between CI monitor polls for this repo (minimum 60).
ci_monitor_interval_seconds.title: Ci Monitor Interval Seconds

cross_repo_target.description: Cross-repo target configuration for fork-contribution workflows. Unset for same-repo delivery.

deployed_log_folder.description: Host path to the live deployment's log directory for this repo. When set, the refine agent can read deployment logs.
deployed_log_folder.title: Deployed Log Folder

forge_remote_url.description: Git remote URL for this repo's forge (e.g. https://github.com/owner/repo).
forge_remote_url.title: Forge Remote Url

langfuse_project_id.description: Langfuse project ID for trace attribution (populated from global secrets).
langfuse_project_id.title: Langfuse Project Id

langfuse_project_name.description: Langfuse project name for trace attribution (populated from global secrets).
langfuse_project_name.title: Langfuse Project Name

langfuse_public_key.description: Langfuse public key for trace observability (populated from global secrets).
langfuse_public_key.title: Langfuse Public Key

langfuse_secret_key.description: Langfuse secret key for trace observability (populated from global secrets).
langfuse_secret_key.title: Langfuse Secret Key

max_concurrency.description: Maximum number of tickets from this repo processed in parallel (minimum 1).
max_concurrency.title: Max Concurrency

max_inflight_prs.description: Maximum number of in-flight PR tickets before the worker stops dispatching new work for this repo. 0 disables.
max_inflight_prs.title: Max Inflight Prs

openrouter_api_key.description: Per-repo OpenRouter API key override. Unset falls back to the global key.
openrouter_api_key.title: Openrouter Api Key

repo_id.description: Unique identifier for this repository (e.g. 'robotsix-mill'). Must match the key in repos.yaml.
repo_id.title: Repo Id

sandbox_image.description: Per-repo Docker sandbox image override. Unset falls back to settings.sandbox_image.
sandbox_image.title: Sandbox Image

source.description: Source discriminator: 'config' for operator-configured entries, 'auto' for machine-registered overlay entries.
source.title: Source

working_branch.description: Pinned working branch for member repos. When set, branches fork from and PR into this branch instead of the default.
working_branch.title: Working Branch

RepoConfig.title: RepoConfig

repos.description:
Repository registry: maps each repo ID to its per-repo
configuration (board identity, forge remote, Langfuse credentials,
CI monitor settings).

meta.description: Optional Langfuse configuration for the synthetic cross-repo meta board.

repos.description: Registry of per-repo configurations keyed by repo_id.
repos.title: Repos
ReposRegistry

secrets.description:
API keys, tokens, and credentials for external services
(OpenRouter, forge, Langfuse, ntfy, etc.).

forge_repo_create_token.description: A PAT used ONLY for repository creation (POST /user/repos). Falls back to forge_token if unset. GitHub App tokens cannot create repos — use a classic PAT with repo-creation scope.
forge_repo_create_token.title: Forge Repo Create Token

forge_token.description: Personal access token (PAT) for the forge (GitHub/GitLab). Used for PR creation, branch push, and merge operations.
forge_token.title: Forge Token

github_app_id.description: GitHub App ID for App-based authentication. Required when FORGE_AUTH=app.
github_app_id.title: Github App Id

github_app_private_key.description: GitHub App private key (PEM string). Alternative to github_app_private_key_path.
github_app_private_key.title: Github App Private Key

github_app_private_key_path.description: Path to the GitHub App private key PEM file. Alternative to github_app_private_key.
github_app_private_key_path.title: Github App Private Key Path

langfuse_base_url.description: Langfuse instance base URL. Defaults to https://cloud.langfuse.com when unset.
langfuse_base_url.title: Langfuse Base Url

langfuse_project_id.description: Langfuse project ID for trace attribution.
langfuse_project_id.title: Langfuse Project Id

langfuse_project_name.description: Langfuse project name for trace attribution.
langfuse_project_name.title: Langfuse Project Name

langfuse_public_key.description: Langfuse public key for LLM observability tracing (https://cloud.langfuse.com).
langfuse_public_key.title: Langfuse Public Key

langfuse_secret_key.description: Langfuse secret key for LLM observability tracing.
langfuse_secret_key.title: Langfuse Secret Key

ntfy_token.description: ntfy access token for authenticated push notifications.
ntfy_token.title: Ntfy Token

ntfy_url.description: ntfy server URL for push notifications (https://ntfy.sh).
ntfy_url.title: Ntfy Url

openrouter_api_key.description: API key for OpenRouter model access (https://openrouter.ai/keys). Required for LLM inference.
openrouter_api_key.title: Openrouter Api Key

openrouter_management_key.description: OpenRouter management API key for credit-balance polling (https://openrouter.ai/keys).
openrouter_management_key.title: Openrouter Management Key

secrets.title: Secrets

settings.description:
Runtime settings for robotsix-mill: concurrency limits,
API endpoints, feature toggles, stage-level controls,
sandbox configuration, and agent budgets.

FORGE_AUTH.description: Forge authentication method: token (PAT) or app (GitHub App installation token).
FORGE_AUTH.title: Forge Auth

FORGE_KIND.description: Forge backend: github, gitlab, none, or auto (detected from remote URL).
FORGE_KIND.title: Forge Kind

FORGE_REMOTE_URL.description: Git remote URL of the forge repository.
FORGE_REMOTE_URL.title: Forge Remote Url

GITHUB_APP_ID.description: GitHub App ID for App-based authentication.
GITHUB_APP_ID.title: Github App Id

GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH.description: Path to GitHub App private key PEM file.
GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH.title: Github App Private Key Path

MILL_CLAUDE_MAX_CONCURRENCY.description: Maximum concurrent Claude Agent SDK runs. Each run spawns a claude CLI subprocess; this semaphore bounds concurrent spawns.
MILL_CLAUDE_MAX_CONCURRENCY.title: Mill Claude Max Concurrency

MILL_COORDINATOR_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.description: Wall-clock timeout (seconds) for a single implement agent pass.
MILL_COORDINATOR_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.title: Mill Coordinator Timeout Seconds

MILL_IMPLEMENT_PASS_TIMEOUT.description: Progress-reset watchdog (seconds) for the implement agent. The timer resets on every tool call (read_file, write_file, explore, etc.) — the agent is killed only after this many seconds of NO progress. 0 disables the watchdog and falls back to the flat coordinator_timeout_seconds cap.
MILL_IMPLEMENT_PASS_TIMEOUT.title: Mill Implement Pass Timeout

MILL_LINT_ON_EDIT.description: When true, pre-write Python syntax check on write_file/edit_file calls.
MILL_LINT_ON_EDIT.title: Mill Lint On Edit

MILL_MAX_GLOBAL_CONCURRENCY.description: Host-level cap on total concurrently-running stages across ALL boards.
MILL_MAX_GLOBAL_CONCURRENCY.title: Mill Max Global Concurrency

MILL_PER_PASS_REQUEST_BUDGET.description: Per-pass request budget for the implement (coordinator) agent. Default 500.
MILL_PER_PASS_REQUEST_BUDGET.title: Mill Per Pass Request Budget

MILL_PR_SUMMARY_ENABLED.description: When true, the deliver stage generates a structured PR body from the diff.
MILL_PR_SUMMARY_ENABLED.title: Mill Pr Summary Enabled

MILL_REPO_VISIBILITY_DEFAULT.description: Default visibility for newly created repositories: public or private.
MILL_REPO_VISIBILITY_DEFAULT.title: Mill Repo Visibility Default

MILL_RETROSPECT_SPAWN_AGENTED_PROPOSALS.description: When true, retrospect files draft tickets for AGENT.md proposals.
MILL_RETROSPECT_SPAWN_AGENTED_PROPOSALS.title: Mill Retrospect Spawn Agented Proposals

MILL_SANDBOX_OP_TIMEOUT.description: Per-docker-exec timeout (seconds) for individual sandbox operations. 0 disables.
MILL_SANDBOX_OP_TIMEOUT.title: Mill Sandbox Op Timeout

MILL_SCOPE_TRIAGE_ENABLED.description: When true, a cheap scope-triage LLM inspects out-of-scope file changes before blocking.
MILL_SCOPE_TRIAGE_ENABLED.title: Mill Scope Triage Enabled

MILL_SCOPE_TRIAGE_MAX_FILES.description: Maximum out-of-scope text files fed to the scope-triage prompt. 0 disables.
MILL_SCOPE_TRIAGE_MAX_FILES.title: Mill Scope Triage Max Files

agent_check_periodic.description: When true, run periodic agent-check passes for agent-definition coherence.
agent_check_periodic.title: Agent Check Periodic

allow_runtime_repo_registration.description: When true, allow POST /repos to hot-register repos at runtime. When false, only operator-configured repos are accepted.
allow_runtime_repo_registration.title: Allow Runtime Repo Registration

api_url.description: Base URL the CLI client uses to reach the management API.
api_url.title: Api Url

audit_periodic.description: When true, run periodic meta-audit passes for quality/security coverage.
audit_periodic.title: Audit Periodic

audit_request_limit.description: Per-call request cap for the periodic audit agent's tool loop.
audit_request_limit.title: Audit Request Limit

auto_approve_enabled.description: When true, obviously-safe changes skip the human approval gate.
auto_approve_enabled.title: Auto Approve Enabled

auto_fix_max_cycles.description: Cross-stage ceiling on combined REBASING + FIXING_CI dispatches without green CI. 0 disables.
auto_fix_max_cycles.title: Auto Fix Max Cycles

auto_merge_enabled.description: When true, the merge stage auto-merges green PRs via the forge API.
auto_merge_enabled.title: Auto Merge Enabled

auto_merge_main_debt_detection_enabled.description: When true, detect pre-existing main-branch CI debt to avoid rebase/ci-fix retry loops.
auto_merge_main_debt_detection_enabled.title: Auto Merge Main Debt Detection Enabled

bc_check_periodic.description: When true, run periodic backward-compatibility inspection passes.
bc_check_periodic.title: Bc Check Periodic

bespoke_discovery_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between bespoke supervisor clone-refresh and YAML reconciliation cycles.
bespoke_discovery_interval_seconds.title: Bespoke Discovery Interval Seconds

bespoke_periodic.description: Master switch: when true, spawn a supervisor per repo that runs bespoke per-repo periodic agents.
bespoke_periodic.title: Bespoke Periodic

board_list_cache_ttl_seconds.description: Short-TTL cache for the board-poll GET /tickets endpoint (seconds). 0.0 disables.
board_list_cache_ttl_seconds.title: Board List Cache Ttl Seconds

changelog_autofill_periodic.description: When true, run periodic changelog-autofill passes that update changelogs from merged PRs.
changelog_autofill_periodic.title: Changelog Autofill Periodic

ci_debt_recheck_periodic.description: When true, periodically re-check BLOCKED tickets with pre-existing CI debt and auto-resume when debt clears.
ci_debt_recheck_periodic.title: Ci Debt Recheck Periodic

ci_fix_max_attempts.description: Multi-repo merge path only: max ci-fix attempts per cycle.
ci_fix_max_attempts.title: Ci Fix Max Attempts

ci_fix_max_cycles.description: Multi-repo merge path only: max ci-fix cycles per ticket.
ci_fix_max_cycles.title: Ci Fix Max Cycles

ci_fix_max_identical_failures.description: Consecutive identical CI failure cycles before escalating. 0 disables.
ci_fix_max_identical_failures.title: Ci Fix Max Identical Failures

ci_fix_max_iterations.description: Maximum wait_for_ci iterations per ticket before escalating to BLOCKED.
ci_fix_max_iterations.title: Ci Fix Max Iterations

ci_fix_memory_path.description: Path to the CI-fix agent's Markdown memory ledger. When unset, derives from data_dir/board/ci_fix_memory.md.
ci_fix_memory_path.title: Ci Fix Memory Path

ci_fix_request_limit.description: Per-run request budget for the ci-fix agent. 0 disables.
ci_fix_request_limit.title: Ci Fix Request Limit

ci_fix_wait_poll_interval_s.description: Seconds between CI conclusion polls during wait_for_ci.
ci_fix_wait_poll_interval_s.title: Ci Fix Wait Poll Interval S

ci_fix_wait_timeout_s.description: Maximum seconds a single wait_for_ci call blocks before returning still-pending.
ci_fix_wait_timeout_s.title: Ci Fix Wait Timeout S

ci_log_max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes of CI log output to capture per check run.
ci_log_max_bytes.title: Ci Log Max Bytes

ci_patterns_path.description: Path to the CI-fix agent's structured pattern memory (JSON). When unset, derives from data_dir/ci_patterns.json.
ci_patterns_path.title: Ci Patterns Path

claude_sdk_vision_enabled.description: Enable inline-image (vision) input on the Claude SDK transport. Requires a robotsix-llmio pin bump with real image-input support.
claude_sdk_vision_enabled.title: Claude Sdk Vision Enabled

codeql_fp_triage_enabled.description: When true, ci_fix may invoke codeql_fp_triage to dismiss high-confidence CodeQL false positives.
codeql_fp_triage_enabled.title: Codeql Fp Triage Enabled

command_timeout.description: Wall-clock cap (seconds) for shell tool and test command execution.
command_timeout.title: Command Timeout

comments_after_body.description: When true, the board detail drawer renders description.md below comments.
comments_after_body.title: Comments After Body

completeness_check_periodic.description: When true, run periodic feature-wiring completeness checks.
completeness_check_periodic.title: Completeness Check Periodic

completeness_check_request_limit.description: Request budget for the completeness-check agent.
completeness_check_request_limit.title: Completeness Check Request Limit

config_sync_periodic.description: When true, run daily config ↔ .env ↔ docs drift detection.
config_sync_periodic.title: Config Sync Periodic

consult_request_limit.description: Per-call request cap for the domain-expert consultation sub-agent.
consult_request_limit.title: Consult Request Limit

coordinator_max_tool_calls.description: Hard cap on total tool calls per coordinator (implement) trace.
coordinator_max_tool_calls.title: Coordinator Max Tool Calls

coordinator_timeout_overrides.description: Per-stage coordinator timeout overrides (dict). Keys are stage names, values are seconds.
coordinator_timeout_overrides.title: Coordinator Timeout Overrides

copy_paste_periodic.description: When true, run weekly clone-detection sweeps.
copy_paste_periodic.title: Copy Paste Periodic

data_dir.description: Local data directory. In container, always /data.
data_dir.title: Data Dir

data_dir_gc_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between periodic data-dir GC passes.
data_dir_gc_interval_seconds.title: Data Dir Gc Interval Seconds

data_dir_gc_periodic.description: Master switch for the periodic data-dir GC pass.
data_dir_gc_periodic.title: Data Dir Gc Periodic

data_dir_gc_prune_closed.description: When true, prune workspace directories of terminal-state tickets during GC.
data_dir_gc_prune_closed.title: Data Dir Gc Prune Closed

data_dir_gc_prune_closed_age_seconds.description: Minimum age (seconds) of a terminal ticket before its workspace is eligible for GC.
data_dir_gc_prune_closed_age_seconds.title: Data Dir Gc Prune Closed Age Seconds

data_dir_gc_prune_db_rows.description: When true, purge oldest terminal-ticket database rows exceeding max_archived_tickets.
data_dir_gc_prune_db_rows.title: Data Dir Gc Prune Db Rows

data_dir_gc_prune_memory_ledgers.description: When true, truncate over-cap memory ledger files on disk before size measurement.
data_dir_gc_prune_memory_ledgers.title: Data Dir Gc Prune Memory Ledgers

data_dir_gc_prune_orphans.description: When true, prune orphan workspace directories (ticket absent from DB) older than the configured age.
data_dir_gc_prune_orphans.title: Data Dir Gc Prune Orphans

data_dir_gc_prune_orphans_age_seconds.description: Minimum age (seconds) of an orphan workspace before GC.
data_dir_gc_prune_orphans_age_seconds.title: Data Dir Gc Prune Orphans Age Seconds

data_dir_gc_prune_terminal_clones.description: When true, prune git clones inside workspaces of terminal-state tickets.
data_dir_gc_prune_terminal_clones.title: Data Dir Gc Prune Terminal Clones

data_dir_gc_prune_terminal_clones_age_se.description: Minimum age (seconds) before terminal-ticket clones are pruned.
data_dir_gc_prune_terminal_clones_age_se.title: Data Dir Gc Prune Terminal Clones Age Seconds

data_volume.description: Named Docker volume for mill data.
data_volume.title: Data Volume

db_maintenance_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between periodic DB maintenance passes.
db_maintenance_interval_seconds.title: Db Maintenance Interval Seconds

db_maintenance_periodic.description: When true, run periodic DB maintenance (archive purge, event capping, PRAGMA optimize).
db_maintenance_periodic.title: Db Maintenance Periodic

dedup_candidate_body_max_chars.description: Character cap on each candidate body fed to the dedup prompt.
dedup_candidate_body_max_chars.title: Dedup Candidate Body Max Chars

dedup_lookback_days.description: Days back closed tickets are considered as duplicate candidates.
dedup_lookback_days.title: Dedup Lookback Days

dedup_max_candidates.description: Maximum candidate tickets passed to the dedup LLM after similarity pre-filtering.
dedup_max_candidates.title: Dedup Max Candidates

dedup_request_limit.description: Per-call request cap for the pre-refine dedup check.
dedup_request_limit.title: Dedup Request Limit

dedup_skip_on_no_overlap.description: When true, skip the dedup LLM call when the draft shares zero token overlap with all candidates.
dedup_skip_on_no_overlap.title: Dedup Skip On No Overlap

default_repo_id.description: Default repo ID for legacy tickets lacking a board_id.
default_repo_id.title: Default Repo Id

delete_branch_on_merge.description: When true, the merge stage deletes the per-ticket head branch on the forge after merge.
delete_branch_on_merge.title: Delete Branch On Merge

deliver_max_identical_blocks.description: Consecutive identical merge-guard blocks before stronger escalation. 0 disables.
deliver_max_identical_blocks.title: Deliver Max Identical Blocks

delta_context_retry_enabled.description: When true, retry/audit/re-refine passes receive only the delta rather than full context.
delta_context_retry_enabled.title: Delta Context Retry Enabled

dependabot_ingest_max_drafts_per_pass.description: Maximum Dependabot drafts per ingest pass. 0 disables.
dependabot_ingest_max_drafts_per_pass.title: Dependabot Ingest Max Drafts Per Pass

dependabot_ingest_periodic.description: When true, iterate registered repos and file deduped drafts for new Dependabot alerts.
dependabot_ingest_periodic.title: Dependabot Ingest Periodic

deploy_api_url.description: Deploy server management API URL. When set, used to check worker image freshness before resuming blocked tickets.
deploy_api_url.title: Deploy Api Url

diagnostic_ci_failure_threshold.description: Distinct-ticket threshold for auto-filing CI fix proposals.
diagnostic_ci_failure_threshold.title: Diagnostic Ci Failure Threshold

diagnostic_events_path.description: Explicit path for the diagnostic event store JSONL file.
diagnostic_events_path.title: Diagnostic Events Path

diagnostic_monitored_repo_ids.description: Repos the daily diagnostic agent monitors each pass.
diagnostic_monitored_repo_ids.title: Diagnostic Monitored Repo Ids

diagnostic_periodic.description: When true, run daily deterministic diagnostic checks.
diagnostic_periodic.title: Diagnostic Periodic

diagnostic_target_repo_id.description: Board the diagnostic agent routes findings to.
diagnostic_target_repo_id.title: Diagnostic Target Repo Id

doc_classifier_diff_max_chars.description: Character cap on the git diff fed to the doc-classifier gate.
doc_classifier_diff_max_chars.title: Doc Classifier Diff Max Chars

doc_classifier_request_limit.description: Per-call request cap for the cheap doc-classifier gate.
doc_classifier_request_limit.title: Doc Classifier Request Limit

doc_memory_path.description: Path to the document agent's Markdown memory ledger. When unset, derives from data_dir/board/doc_memory.md.
doc_memory_path.title: Doc Memory Path

doc_request_limit.description: Per-call request cap for the document agent.
doc_request_limit.title: Doc Request Limit

docstring_coverage_max_errors.description: Hard cap on tool-call errors before auto-termination of docstring_coverage agent.
docstring_coverage_max_errors.title: Docstring Coverage Max Errors

docstring_coverage_max_tool_calls.description: Hard cap on total tool calls per docstring_coverage trace.
docstring_coverage_max_tool_calls.title: Docstring Coverage Max Tool Calls

docstring_coverage_periodic.description: When true, run periodic docstring-coverage passes for public-API documentation oversight.
docstring_coverage_periodic.title: Docstring Coverage Periodic

docstring_coverage_request_limit.description: Per-call request cap for the docstring-coverage agent's tool loop.
docstring_coverage_request_limit.title: Docstring Coverage Request Limit

enable_repo_creation.description: When true, Forge.create_repo() is permitted to create repositories via the forge API.
enable_repo_creation.title: Enable Repo Creation

epic_dedup_lookback_days.description: Recency window (days) for advisory duplicate detection in epic decomposition.
epic_dedup_lookback_days.title: Epic Dedup Lookback Days

explore_max_tokens.description: Maximum output tokens for the exploration sub-agent.
explore_max_tokens.title: Explore Max Tokens

explore_request_limit.description: Per-call request cap for the exploration sub-agent.
explore_request_limit.title: Explore Request Limit

fetch_image.description: Docker image used for isolated web_fetch calls (curl-based, network-only, no repo mount).
fetch_image.title: Fetch Image

forge_parity_periodic.description: When true, run weekly forge-adapter drift detection.
forge_parity_periodic.title: Forge Parity Periodic

freshness_gate_enabled.description: When true, a pre-refine gate verifies cited file paths and line ranges still exist on HEAD.
freshness_gate_enabled.title: Freshness Gate Enabled

frontend_sync_periodic.description: When true, run daily board frontend sync checks.
frontend_sync_periodic.title: Frontend Sync Periodic

github_api_url.description: GitHub API base URL. Override for GitHub Enterprise.
github_api_url.title: Github Api Url

gitlab_api_url.description: GitLab API base URL. Override for self-hosted GitLab instances.
gitlab_api_url.title: Gitlab Api Url

health_periodic.description: When true, run periodic health passes for codebase-health inspection.
health_periodic.title: Health Periodic

implement_max_spawns_per_ticket.description: Maximum times the implement stage may be entered per ticket. 0 disables.
implement_max_spawns_per_ticket.title: Implement Max Spawns Per Ticket

implement_memory_path.description: Path to the implement agent's Markdown memory ledger. When unset, derives from data_dir/board/implement_memory.md.
implement_memory_path.title: Implement Memory Path

implement_stall_threshold.description: Consecutive no-progress BLOCKED cycles before stall guard fires. 0 disables.
implement_stall_threshold.title: Implement Stall Threshold

langfuse_cleanup_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between Langfuse trace cleanup passes.
langfuse_cleanup_interval_seconds.title: Langfuse Cleanup Interval Seconds

langfuse_cleanup_max_traces.description: Maximum traces to retain in the Langfuse project during cleanup.
langfuse_cleanup_max_traces.title: Langfuse Cleanup Max Traces

langfuse_cleanup_periodic.description: When true, run periodic Langfuse trace cleanup (delete oldest traces).
langfuse_cleanup_periodic.title: Langfuse Cleanup Periodic

language_instructions_dir.description: Directory of per-language instruction Markdown snippets.
language_instructions_dir.title: Language Instructions Dir

low_credit_poll_enabled.description: Enable proactive OpenRouter credit-balance polling. The reactive 402 path still fires when disabled.
low_credit_poll_enabled.title: Low Credit Poll Enabled

low_credit_poll_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between proactive OpenRouter credit-balance polls.
low_credit_poll_interval_seconds.title: Low Credit Poll Interval Seconds

low_credit_threshold_usd.description: OpenRouter balance below this threshold triggers an amber warning banner on the board.
low_credit_threshold_usd.title: Low Credit Threshold Usd

max_archived_tickets.description: Maximum terminal-state tickets to retain. 0 disables purging.
max_archived_tickets.title: Max Archived Tickets

max_comments_per_ticket.description: Maximum Comment rows per non-terminal ticket. Open threads are never pruned. 0 disables.
max_comments_per_ticket.title: Max Comments Per Ticket

max_events_per_ticket.description: Maximum TicketEvent rows per non-terminal ticket. 0 disables capping.
max_events_per_ticket.title: Max Events Per Ticket

max_fix_iterations.description: Maximum implement→test fix iterations before the ticket is BLOCKED.
max_fix_iterations.title: Max Fix Iterations

max_implement_review_cycles.description: Ceiling on total implement passes per ticket across all review rounds. 0 disables.
max_implement_review_cycles.title: Max Implement Review Cycles

max_memory_chars.description: Maximum characters of the memory ledger to load per agent pass. 0 disables capping.
max_memory_chars.title: Max Memory Chars

max_openrouter_marginal_usd_per_ticket.description: Maximum OpenRouter marginal cost per ticket. 0.0 disables.
max_openrouter_marginal_usd_per_ticket.title: Max Openrouter Marginal Usd Per Ticket

max_re_refine_cycles_before_cheap.description: Sendback re-refine rounds before forcing the cheap model. 0 disables.
max_re_refine_cycles_before_cheap.title: Max Re Refine Cycles Before Cheap

max_refine_explore_calls.description: Hard cap on explore/parallel_explore sub-agent calls per refine run. Set to 0 to disable exploration entirely.
max_refine_explore_calls.title: Max Refine Explore Calls

max_refine_passes_per_ticket.description: Per-ticket ceiling on total refine passes before escalating to BLOCKED. 0 disables.
max_refine_passes_per_ticket.title: Max Refine Passes Per Ticket

max_refine_read_file_calls.description: Hard cap on read_file calls per refine/triage agent run. Set to 0 to disable the cap.
max_refine_read_file_calls.title: Max Refine Read File Calls

max_spend_usd_per_ticket.description: Dollar-cap safety net: cumulative LLM spend per ticket before blocking. 0.0 disables.
max_spend_usd_per_ticket.title: Max Spend Usd Per Ticket

max_stuck_cycles.description: Maximum re-entries to the same stage without progress before escalating to BLOCKED.
max_stuck_cycles.title: Max Stuck Cycles

max_traces_per_ticket.description: Maximum Langfuse traces per ticket. 0 disables.
max_traces_per_ticket.title: Max Traces Per Ticket

member_sync_periodic.description: When true, auto-discover workspace members from managed repo vcs2l manifests.
member_sync_periodic.title: Member Sync Periodic

merge_poll_seconds.description: Re-check cadence (seconds) for human_mr_approval (PR open) waiting for external merge.
merge_poll_seconds.title: Merge Poll Seconds

meta_periodic.description: When true, run the daily cross-repo meta-agent pass for extraction/alignment proposals.
meta_periodic.title: Meta Periodic

module_curator_periodic.description: When true, run daily module-taxonomy drift detection.
module_curator_periodic.title: Module Curator Periodic

module_curator_request_limit.description: Request budget for the module-curator agent.
module_curator_request_limit.title: Module Curator Request Limit

module_size_max_errors.description: Hard cap on tool-call errors before auto-termination of module_size agent.
module_size_max_errors.title: Module Size Max Errors

module_size_max_tool_calls.description: Hard cap on total tool calls per module_size trace.
module_size_max_tool_calls.title: Module Size Max Tool Calls

module_size_periodic.description: When true, run periodic module-size passes for oversized-file oversight.
module_size_periodic.title: Module Size Periodic

module_size_request_limit.description: Per-call request cap for the module-size agent's tool loop.
module_size_request_limit.title: Module Size Request Limit

network_outage_retry_seconds.description: Seconds between re-poll attempts during a detected network outage.
network_outage_retry_seconds.title: Network Outage Retry Seconds

network_probe_host.description: Hostname probed to distinguish network outages from upstream errors.
network_probe_host.title: Network Probe Host

obsolescence_gate_enabled.description: When true, an LLM pre-refine gate re-evaluates whether a cited gap still exists on HEAD.
obsolescence_gate_enabled.title: Obsolescence Gate Enabled

obsolescence_request_limit.description: Per-call request cap for the obsolescence gate.
obsolescence_request_limit.title: Obsolescence Request Limit

orphaned_pr_bot_logins.description: Bot author logins trusted for orphaned-PR actions. Empty = auto-resolve from forge.
orphaned_pr_bot_logins.title: Orphaned Pr Bot Logins

orphaned_pr_check_periodic.description: When true, run periodic orphaned-PR detection and cleanup.
orphaned_pr_check_periodic.title: Orphaned Pr Check Periodic

orphaned_pr_dry_run.description: When true, log intent only for orphaned-PR actions — no forge mutations.
orphaned_pr_dry_run.title: Orphaned Pr Dry Run

orphaned_pr_max_actions_per_pass.description: Maximum combined close+file actions per orphaned-PR pass.
orphaned_pr_max_actions_per_pass.title: Orphaned Pr Max Actions Per Pass

orphaned_pr_max_closes_per_pass.description: Maximum close actions per orphaned-PR pass (in addition to combined cap).
orphaned_pr_max_closes_per_pass.title: Orphaned Pr Max Closes Per Pass

orphaned_pr_max_files_per_pass.description: Maximum file-ticket actions per orphaned-PR pass (in addition to combined cap).
orphaned_pr_max_files_per_pass.title: Orphaned Pr Max Files Per Pass

orphaned_pr_min_age_hours.description: Minimum ticket age (hours) before its PR is considered for orphan classification.
orphaned_pr_min_age_hours.title: Orphaned Pr Min Age Hours

orphaned_pr_track_foreign_prs.description: When true, also file tracking tickets for foreign (non-mill) open PRs.
orphaned_pr_track_foreign_prs.title: Orphaned Pr Track Foreign Prs

pin_bump_periodic.description: When true, run scheduled dependency pin-bump PR actuator passes.
pin_bump_periodic.title: Pin Bump Periodic

ping_pong_max_alternations.description: Ceiling on REBASING to FIXING_CI alternations before escalating. 0 disables.
ping_pong_max_alternations.title: Ping Pong Max Alternations

prerequisite_gate_enabled.description: When true, a pre-implement gate verifies declared import prerequisites are satisfiable.
prerequisite_gate_enabled.title: Prerequisite Gate Enabled

prune_clone_on_close.description: When true, the workspace clone (repo/) is removed on ticket close.
prune_clone_on_close.title: Prune Clone On Close

read_file_max_chars.description: Character cap on implicit full read_file payloads. 0 disables.
read_file_max_chars.title: Read File Max Chars

rebase_max_attempts.description: Maximum rebase attempts per ticket before escalating to BLOCKED.
rebase_max_attempts.title: Rebase Max Attempts

rebase_memory_path.description: Path to the rebase agent's Markdown memory ledger. When unset, derives from data_dir/board/rebase_memory.md.
rebase_memory_path.title: Rebase Memory Path

refine_advisory_dedup_enabled.description: When true, a cheap advisory-dedup-verification gate runs after inflight-advisory phase.
refine_advisory_dedup_enabled.title: Refine Advisory Dedup Enabled

refine_delta_reuse_enabled.description: When true, re-refines reuse the prior description.md and apply only the operator's delta.
refine_delta_reuse_enabled.title: Refine Delta Reuse Enabled

refine_dynamic_limit_min.description: Floor for dynamic request-limit on large/complex specs.
refine_dynamic_limit_min.title: Refine Dynamic Limit Min

refine_dynamic_limit_multiplier.description: Multiplier for dynamic request-limit on large/complex specs.
refine_dynamic_limit_multiplier.title: Refine Dynamic Limit Multiplier

refine_dynamic_limit_spec_chars.description: Character threshold above which the dynamic request-limit multiplier activates.
refine_dynamic_limit_spec_chars.title: Refine Dynamic Limit Spec Chars

refine_findings_downgrade_enabled.description: When true, Opus refines with substantial triage findings downgrade to a cheaper model.
refine_findings_downgrade_enabled.title: Refine Findings Downgrade Enabled

refine_findings_downgrade_min_chars.description: Minimum stripped-character length of triage findings for the Opus-to-cheaper downgrade.
refine_findings_downgrade_min_chars.title: Refine Findings Downgrade Min Chars

refine_max_errors.description: Hard cap on tool-call errors before auto-termination of refine agent.
refine_max_errors.title: Refine Max Errors

refine_max_tool_calls.description: Hard cap on total tool calls per refine trace.
refine_max_tool_calls.title: Refine Max Tool Calls

refine_memory_path.description: Path to the refine agent's Markdown memory ledger. When unset, derives from data_dir/board/refine_memory.md.
refine_memory_path.title: Refine Memory Path

refine_prescriptive_spec_code_lines_thre.description: Drafts with more than this many fenced code lines skip refine entirely.
refine_prescriptive_spec_code_lines_thre.title: Refine Prescriptive Spec Code Lines Threshold

refine_request_limit.description: Per-call request cap for the refine agent's tool loop.
refine_request_limit.title: Refine Request Limit

refine_request_limit_simple.description: Per-call request cap for non-escalated (simple/sonnet) refine runs.
refine_request_limit_simple.title: Refine Request Limit Simple

refine_skip_llm_on_impl_ready_spec.description: When true, implementation-ready specs skip the expensive LLM refine agent.
refine_skip_llm_on_impl_ready_spec.title: Refine Skip Llm On Impl Ready Spec

refine_subscription_model_complex.description: Claude model alias for escalated level-3 refines (complexity=needs-exploration).
refine_subscription_model_complex.title: Refine Subscription Model Complex

refine_subscription_model_default.description: Claude model alias for non-escalated level-3 refines (complexity=simple).
refine_subscription_model_default.title: Refine Subscription Model Default

refine_subscription_model_findings.description: Claude model alias used when the findings-present downgrade fires.
refine_subscription_model_findings.title: Refine Subscription Model Findings

refine_subscription_tier_routing_enabled.description: When true, non-trivial level-3 refines route to sonnet for simple tickets, opus for complex.
refine_subscription_tier_routing_enabled.title: Refine Subscription Tier Routing Enabled

refine_triage_enabled.description: When true, a cheap triage LLM call runs before full refine for implementation-ready drafts.
refine_triage_enabled.title: Refine Triage Enabled

refine_trivial_routing_enabled.description: When true, triage-trivial tickets route to refine_trivial_model_level instead of the YAML default.
refine_trivial_routing_enabled.title: Refine Trivial Routing Enabled

refine_trivial_subscription_model.description: Claude model alias for trivial/forced-cheap refines on the subscription tier.
refine_trivial_subscription_model.title: Refine Trivial Subscription Model

refine_usage_warning_threshold.description: Fraction (0.0–1.0) of request_limit at which a near-exhaustion warning is emitted.
refine_usage_warning_threshold.title: Refine Usage Warning Threshold

refine_web_fetch_max_calls.description: Maximum real web_fetch calls across one refine trace.
refine_web_fetch_max_calls.title: Refine Web Fetch Max Calls

refine_web_fetch_max_total_bytes.description: Maximum fetch bytes across one refine trace. 0 disables.
refine_web_fetch_max_total_bytes.title: Refine Web Fetch Max Total Bytes

refine_web_search_max_calls.description: Maximum web_search calls across one refine trace.
refine_web_search_max_calls.title: Refine Web Search Max Calls

repo_description_sync_periodic.description: When true, run periodic repo-description-sync passes.
repo_description_sync_periodic.title: Repo Description Sync Periodic

requeue_batch_pause_seconds.description: Pause (seconds) between batches in the startup re-queue drip feed.
requeue_batch_pause_seconds.title: Requeue Batch Pause Seconds

requeue_batch_size.description: Tickets enqueued per batch in the startup re-queue drip feed.
requeue_batch_size.title: Requeue Batch Size

require_approval.description: When true, refined tickets require human approval before implement stage.
require_approval.title: Require Approval

retrospect_candidates_max_entries.description: Max entries retained in AGENT_CANDIDATES.md. 0 disables pruning.
retrospect_candidates_max_entries.title: Retrospect Candidates Max Entries

retrospect_log_max_chars.description: Maximum characters of history+comments logs fed to the retrospect agent. 0 disables.
retrospect_log_max_chars.title: Retrospect Log Max Chars

retrospect_memory_path.description: Path to the retrospect agent's Markdown memory ledger.
retrospect_memory_path.title: Retrospect Memory Path

retrospect_spawn_drafts.description: When true, retrospect may file improvement draft tickets.
retrospect_spawn_drafts.title: Retrospect Spawn Drafts

review_diff_max_chars.description: Maximum characters of the combined git diff injected into the review prompt. 0 disables.
review_diff_max_chars.title: Review Diff Max Chars

review_enabled.description: When true, implement transitions to code_review before deliver.
review_enabled.title: Review Enabled

review_feedback_enabled.description: When true, the review-revision agent auto-implements requested PR changes.
review_feedback_enabled.title: Review Feedback Enabled

review_max_rounds.description: Maximum CODE_REVIEW to READY to DOCUMENTING to CODE_REVIEW round-trips before escalation.
review_max_rounds.title: Review Max Rounds

review_output_token_budget.description: Output token budget for the review agent retry on max_tokens exhaustion. 0 disables.
review_output_token_budget.title: Review Output Token Budget

review_prior_context_max_chars.description: Maximum characters of prior review context fed to the review agent. 0 disables.
review_prior_context_max_chars.title: Review Prior Context Max Chars

review_request_limit.description: Per-call request cap for the review agent.
review_request_limit.title: Review Request Limit

review_revision_max_attempts.description: Maximum review-revision attempts per ticket before escalating to BLOCKED.
review_revision_max_attempts.title: Review Revision Max Attempts

review_revision_memory_path.description: Path to the review-revision agent's Markdown memory ledger. When unset, derives from data_dir/board/review_revision_memory.md.
review_revision_memory_path.title: Review Revision Memory Path

reviewer_agreement_gate_enabled.description: When true, reviewer agreement with a no-change-needed conclusion short-circuits to DONE.
reviewer_agreement_gate_enabled.title: Reviewer Agreement Gate Enabled

run_health_memory_path.description: Path to the run-health agent's Markdown memory ledger.
run_health_memory_path.title: Run Health Memory Path

run_health_periodic.description: When true, run daily cross-board run-registry health monitoring.
run_health_periodic.title: Run Health Periodic

run_health_target_repo_id.description: Board the run-health agent files its drafts to.
run_health_target_repo_id.title: Run Health Target Repo Id

sandbox_data_mount.description: Host path for bind-mounted .data directory. Overrides data_volume.

sandbox_image.description: Docker image for the command sandbox.
sandbox_image.title: Sandbox Image

sandbox_network.description: Docker network sandbox containers connect to.
sandbox_network.title: Sandbox Network

sandbox_proxy_url.description: Egress proxy URL for sandbox containers. Set to empty string to disable.
sandbox_proxy_url.title: Sandbox Proxy Url

sandbox_readonly.description: When true, sandbox containers run with read-only root filesystem.

sandbox_reaper_periodic.description: When true, periodically force-remove leaked/orphaned sandbox containers.

shutdown_grace_seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for in-flight periodic passes before teardown.

smoke_command.description: Global fallback smoke test command. Per-repo smoke_command in .robotsix-mill/config.json takes precedence.

spec_review_enabled.description: When true, a post-refinement review pass strips verbose narrative from the spec.

stage_retry_base_delay.description: Base delay (seconds) for exponential backoff between stage retries.

stage_retry_max_attempts.description: Maximum stage-level retry attempts for transient errors before escalating.
stage_retry_max_attempts.title: Stage Retry Max Attempts

stage_retry_max_delay.description: Maximum delay (seconds) for exponential backoff between stage retries.
stage_retry_max_delay.title: Stage Retry Max Delay

stage_timeout_overrides.description: Per-stage timeout overrides (dict). Keys are stage names, values are seconds.
stage_timeout_overrides.title: Stage Timeout Overrides

stale_branch_cleanup_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between automatic stale-branch cleanup passes.
stale_branch_cleanup_interval_seconds.title: Stale Branch Cleanup Interval Seconds

stale_branch_cleanup_periodic.description: When true, run periodic stale-branch cleanup passes.
stale_branch_cleanup_periodic.title: Stale Branch Cleanup Periodic

stale_branch_cleanup_prefix_only.description: When true, only delete branches matching branch_prefix.
stale_branch_cleanup_prefix_only.title: Stale Branch Cleanup Prefix Only

stale_branch_max_age_days.description: Branch is eligible for cleanup only if its last commit is older than this many days.
stale_branch_max_age_days.title: Stale Branch Max Age Days

startup_jitter_seconds.description: Max random jitter (seconds) added to per-repo periodic pass first-tick delay.

state_sync_periodic.description: When true, run daily State-enum consistency checks.

subtask_request_limit.description: Per-subtask request budget when the coordinator delegates via spawn_subtask.

survey_periodic.description: When true, run periodic survey passes for OSS project discovery.

survey_request_limit.title: Survey Request Limit

survey_web_fetch_max_calls.description: Maximum web_fetch calls per survey run.
survey_web_fetch_max_calls.title: Survey Web Fetch Max Calls

survey_web_fetch_max_total_bytes.description: Maximum fetch bytes per survey run. 0 disables.

survey_web_search_max_calls.description: Maximum web_search calls per survey run.
survey_web_search_max_calls.title: Survey Web Search Max Calls

test_command.description: Global fallback test command. Per-repo test_command in repos config takes precedence.

test_gap_max_errors.description: Hard cap on tool-call errors before auto-termination of test_gap agent.
test_gap_max_errors.title: Test Gap Max Errors

test_gap_max_tool_calls.description: Hard cap on total tool calls per test_gap trace.
test_gap_max_tool_calls.title: Test Gap Max Tool Calls

test_gap_periodic.description: When true, run periodic test-gap passes for test-coverage oversight.
test_gap_periodic.title: Test Gap Periodic

test_gap_request_limit.description: Per-call request cap for the test-gap agent's tool loop.
test_gap_request_limit.title: Test Gap Request Limit

test_request_limit.description: Request budget for the test agent when diagnosing failures.
test_request_limit.title: Test Request Limit

ticket_state_cycle_limit.description: Per-ticket ceiling on same-LLM-stage dispatches within one processing pass. 0 disables.

timeout_escalation_periodic.description: When true, run periodic timeout-escalation passes for stuck AWAITING_USER_REPLY tickets.

timeout_escalation_threshold_seconds.description: Staleness threshold: tickets in AWAITING_USER_REPLY older than this are escalated to BLOCKED.

trace_health_periodic.description: When true, run periodic trace-health checks.
trace_health_periodic.title: Trace Health Periodic

trace_review_cost_multiplier.description: Cost outlier multiplier: traces exceeding batch median x this are flagged for inspection.
trace_review_cost_multiplier.title: Trace Review Cost Multiplier

trace_review_dedup_lookback_days.description: Recency window (days) for pre-filing duplicate check in trace-review.
trace_review_dedup_lookback_days.title: Trace Review Dedup Lookback Days

trace_review_initial_lookback_hours.description: First-run lookback window (hours) when no watermark exists yet.
trace_review_initial_lookback_hours.title: Trace Review Initial Lookback Hours

trace_review_inspector_max_obs_for_tools.description: Observation count above which the inspector drops code-access tools.
trace_review_inspector_max_obs_for_tools.title: Trace Review Inspector Max Obs For Tools

trace_review_inspector_max_requests.description: Ceiling for the trace inspector's tools-on request budget.

trace_review_inspector_min_requests.description: Floor for the trace inspector's tools-on request budget.
trace_review_inspector_min_requests.title: Trace Review Inspector Min Requests

trace_review_inspector_requests_per_obs.description: Requests granted per trace observation before clamping to min/max.
trace_review_inspector_requests_per_obs.title: Trace Review Inspector Requests Per Obs

trace_review_inspector_toolless_requests.description: Request budget for the tool-less (summary-only) inspector path.
trace_review_inspector_toolless_requests.title: Trace Review Inspector Toolless Requests

trace_review_max_drafts_per_run.description: Hard cap on total drafts a single trace-review pass may file.
trace_review_max_drafts_per_run.title: Trace Review Max Drafts Per Run

trace_review_max_errors.description: Hard cap on tool-call errors before the trace inspector is auto-terminated.
trace_review_max_errors.title: Trace Review Max Errors

trace_review_max_inspections_per_run.description: Hard cap on LLM inspector calls per trace-review run. 0 disables.
trace_review_max_inspections_per_run.title: Trace Review Max Inspections Per Run

trace_review_max_repeated_tool.description: Absolute threshold for repeated-tool-call flagging in trace review.
trace_review_max_repeated_tool.title: Trace Review Max Repeated Tool

trace_review_max_tool_calls.description: Hard cap on total tool calls per trace inspector run.
trace_review_max_tool_calls.title: Trace Review Max Tool Calls

trace_review_max_traces_per_run.description: Hard cap on how many traces a single trace-review run pulls full detail for. 0 disables.
trace_review_max_traces_per_run.title: Trace Review Max Traces Per Run

trace_review_min_confidence.description: Minimum inspector confidence for a finding to be filed as a draft.
trace_review_min_confidence.title: Trace Review Min Confidence

trace_review_model_level.description: Model tier for the trace inspector (1=flash, 2=pro, 3=opus).
trace_review_model_level.title: Trace Review Model Level

trace_review_obs_multiplier.description: Observation count multiplier: traces exceeding batch median x this are flagged.
trace_review_obs_multiplier.title: Trace Review Obs Multiplier

trace_review_per_obs_cost_threshold.description: Per-observation cost threshold for trace-review outlier detection.
trace_review_per_obs_cost_threshold.title: Trace Review Per Obs Cost Threshold

trace_review_periodic.description: When true, run periodic trace-review passes (scans traces, flags outliers, files drafts).
trace_review_periodic.title: Trace Review Periodic

trace_review_restart_correlation_window_.description: Window (seconds) for correlating incomplete traces with process restarts.
trace_review_restart_correlation_window_.title: Trace Review Restart Correlation Window Seconds

trace_review_target_repo_id.description: Target repo for trace-review draft tickets. Empty preserves source-repo routing.

trace_review_tool_request_limit.description: Request budget for the interactive langfuse_inspect_trace tool.
trace_review_tool_request_limit.title: Trace Review Tool Request Limit

triage_boilerplate_periodic.description: When true, run weekly triage-pattern scans.
triage_boilerplate_periodic.title: Triage Boilerplate Periodic

triage_request_limit.description: Per-call request cap for the pre-refine triage agent.
triage_request_limit.title: Triage Request Limit

web_fetch_max_bytes.description: Maximum raw bytes per web_fetch call.
web_fetch_max_bytes.title: Web Fetch Max Bytes

web_fetch_max_calls.description: Maximum real (cache-miss) web_fetch calls per web_knowledge consultation.
web_fetch_max_calls.title: Web Fetch Max Calls

web_fetch_max_text_bytes.description: Post-extraction character cap per web_fetch (after HTML-to-text stripping).
web_fetch_max_text_bytes.title: Web Fetch Max Text Bytes

web_fetch_max_total_bytes.description: Cumulative ceiling on returned text bytes per web_knowledge consultation. 0 disables.
web_fetch_max_total_bytes.title: Web Fetch Max Total Bytes

web_fetch_raw.description: When true, web_fetch returns the raw response body verbatim (no HTML stripping, no per-run URL dedupe).
web_fetch_raw.title: Web Fetch Raw

web_knowledge_cache_ttl_hours.description: Hours since last_verified before a cached knowledge file is flagged as stale in the index.
web_knowledge_cache_ttl_hours.title: Web Knowledge Cache Ttl Hours

web_knowledge_model.description: Model alias for the web-knowledge gateway sub-agent.
web_knowledge_model.title: Web Knowledge Model

web_knowledge_request_limit.description: Request budget for the web_knowledge sub-agent per consultation.
web_knowledge_request_limit.title: Web Knowledge Request Limit

web_knowledge_stale_days.description: Days before a cached web_knowledge .md file is considered stale and eligible for refresh.
web_knowledge_stale_days.title: Web Knowledge Stale Days

web_research_request_limit.description: Request budget for the web_research sub-agent spawned by refine/implement.

web_search.description: Enable web search via a cheap bounded sub-agent for refine and implement agents.
